## Summary

Describe the change and its user or maintainer impact.

## Skill integration

- [ ] `skills-manifest.json` is updated when inventory, ownership, support, source, runtime, or validation changes.
- [ ] Generated README sections and agent mirrors are current (`python .\tools\generate_repository_artifacts.py --check`).
- [ ] `SKILL.md` is added or updated.
- [ ] `agents/openai.yaml` is added or updated.
- [ ] `PROVENANCE.md` or source-lock information is added or updated where applicable.
- [ ] Hosted behavioral tests are added or updated, or an environment-dependent limitation is explicit.
- [ ] Platform and agent support claims match implemented behavior.
- [ ] Installation and root documentation are updated when user-facing behavior changes.
- [ ] No undeclared machine-specific absolute path is required.
- [ ] Office COM changes have a self-hosted smoke-test plan.
- [ ] Licensing implications were reviewed.

## Validation

List the exact commands and environments used.

## Remaining risks

Describe untested environments, deferred work, rollback considerations, or known limitations.
